attributes.description: Categories most commonly used as data-exfiltration channels in insider-threat cases: file-sharing services (WeTransfer / MEGA / MediaFire / AnonFiles / file.io), personal cloud storage (Google Drive / Dropbox / OneDrive personal / iCloud / Box), personal webmail (Gmail / Outlook.com / Yahoo / Proton), and generative AI assistants (ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini / Copilot / Perplexity — increasingly used to paste corporate data into).

attributes.title: Browser: Exfil-Channel & Canary Visits
